evidence.scientific_clarity: Dual-axis time-series clearly shows monotonically decreasing training loss (log scale, left) and cosine LR decay (right); color-coupled axis labels aid reading as the brief requested.
evidence.typography: Script does not set pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=none; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmap) DejaVu Sans embedding — text is not selectable/editable in the PDF.
evidence.palette: Blue (#1f77b4) for loss and red (#d62728) for LR are colorblind-safe (distinguishable in deuteranopia); no red/green directional confusion; categorical discipline maintained.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout used; single-panel fills figure area well (7x4 inches); no overlapping labels; log y-range spans full loss dynamic range; no excessive whitespace.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption explicitly warns right axis is not a performance metric (addresses the brief hint); legend placed upper-right without overlap; minor issue: no data.json makes reproduction verification impossible, and no grid lines for log axis.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is only 17 KB with Type 3 (bitmap-rasterized) DejaVu Sans font — not true vector with selectable text; fonttype=42 (Type 1/TrueType) was not set in the script.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs exist and are non-trivial: figure.pdf (17 KB), figure.png (74 KB), figure.svg (44 KB), caption.tex (466 B); bonus SVG also present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states specific numerical values (loss ~2.19 to ~0.21, LR 10^-3 to 0), describes both series, mentions log scale, color coupling, and correctly cautions against misreading the right axis.

overall_strengths: Color-coupled axis labels and spines elegantly link each series to its scale, directly fulfilling the brief's hint.
Caption is scientifically precise with quantitative claims and proactively addresses the potential dual-decreasing-axis confusion.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0) not set: the PDF embeds Type 3 bitmap fonts, making text non-selectable and non-editable — a standard journal requirement.
Default DejaVu Sans font family is used throughout; no explicit font choice made, and no rcParams font configuration in the script.
